narrative:
No non-compliant items were identified during this Re-License inspection. 
 
Each applicant for a license must demonstrate that his or her location(s) and any 
animals, facilities, vehicles, equipment, or other locations used or intended for use in the 
business comply with the Animal Welfare Act (AWA) and the regulations and standards. The 
purpose of this inspection is to help USDA ascertain your compliance with the AWA and 
regulations and standards. USDA conducted the inspection and exit briefing with the 
applicant. 
We will send a copy of your new license to you within 30 days, unless additional 
review is required. You do not need to take further action at this time. If you have not received 
your license within 30 days, please contact the USDA at 970-494-7478. 
Conducting regulated activities prior to issuance of a valid USDA license is a violation 
of the Animal Welfare Act. 
 
Additional Inspectors: 
Richard Burdeaux, VETERINARY MEDICAL OFFICER n
